top_signals.title: SpaceX's $25 billion bond sale drives huge demand - and a potential headache for investors
top_signals.summary: SpaceX’s $25 billion debt sale drew heavy demand, but analysts warn of capital spending, refinancing and investor concentration risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: HDFC Bank Appoints Ex-Bureaucrat Rajiv Kumar as Part-Time Chair
top_signals.summary: HDFC Bank Ltd. named former finance secretary, Rajiv Kumar, as its part-time chairman, months after the abrupt resignation of Atanu Chakraborty sparked questions about governance at the nation’s largest private lender.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Vitalik Buterin calls obfuscation cryptography’s ‘final boss,’ but says current approaches remain wildly impractical
top_signals.summary: Vitalik Buterin said obfuscation is cryptography’s “final boss,” citing impractical iO schemes with “literally galactic” runtimes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Iraq’s 14 Million Barrels of Trapped Oil Escape Through Hormuz - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Iraq’s 14 Million Barrels of Trapped Oil Escape Through Hormuz  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
